campaign.subtitle: Travel the lands of Ravenof and defeat every chapter boss.
campaign.title: Campaign

game.chatEmpty: Write a message to your opponent.
game.collapseTip: Collapse – you can play, the tip will wait
game.controlUntilNextTurn: Controlled until the start of the next turn
game.copyText: Choose a creature – its effect becomes your creature's effect.
game.copyTitle: Copy an effect from the graveyard
game.deckTopText: Top cards (left = top). They stay in the deck.
game.defeatText: No worries – this is training. Try again, now you know the rules!
game.discardForGoldTip: Discard 1 card from hand and gain +100 gold (1×/turn)
game.errDeck: Failed to load the deck cards
game.errTutorialDeck: Failed to load the tutorial deck cards
game.glwText: Choose a graveyard creature – its Last Wish will be activated immediately.
game.hintAttacker: ⚔ Choose a target (red outline) or press Esc
game.hintDiscard: 🗑 Choose a card in hand to discard for +100 gold
game.hintSacrifice: ⚜ Tribute: a creature on the board (1 pt) OR 2 cards in hand ({{picked}}/2)
game.hintSpell: ✨ Choose a spell target or press Esc
game.noSkills: This Champion has no configured skills.
game.opponentNoShow: The opponent didn't join within 30s – YOU WIN! 🏆
game.peekMark: Select {{choose}} card(s) to discard to the graveyard ({{picked}}/{{choose}})
game.pickReturnUnit: Choose ANY creature – it returns to its owner's hand.
game.reactionsTip: Check your face-down reactions (the opponent can't see them)
game.rotateText: The battle is played in landscape
game.skillUsed: The skill has already been used this turn.
game.swapPhaseText: "{{card}}" (phase {{phase}}) is swapped for a lower-phase card from your deck (the current Champion returns to the deck).
game.toastAlreadyDiscarded: You already discarded a card this turn.
game.toastAlreadyPicked: {{need}} already selected. Deselect one or press "OK".
game.toastChampionTribute: The Champion needs a tribute: 1 creature on the board OR 2 cards in hand.
game.toastDoTaskFirst: First complete the task from the tip.
game.toastNeedPhase: You need a phase {{phase}} Champion on the board (or hold a lower phase in your deck to swap).
game.toastNoSacChampion: You cannot sacrifice the Champion itself.
game.toastNotEnoughGold: Not enough gold: cost {{cost}}, you have {{gold}}.
game.toastPickEffectTarget: Choose a target for the effect (highlighted creatures).
game.toastTributeHand: Tribute from hand: {{picked}}/2 (or tap a creature on the board = 1 pt).
game.toastTributeHint: Tribute: a creature on the board (1 pt) OR 2 cards in hand (0/2).
game.tutorialGold: 🎓 Tutorial gold added – you can play a card now.
game.victoryText: Great! Now you know how to play Ravenof. Time for a real battle!

discard-gold-tip.text: Once per turn you can discard 1 card from your hand and gain +100 gold. Press the "+100⚜" button and pick a card – or skip it.
discard-gold-tip.title: Tip: card → gold

end-first-turn.text: When you have nothing left to do (or no gold), press "End turn". Then the opponent plays – watch what they do!
end-first-turn.title: End your turn

free-play.text: From now on, play freely. I'll explain new mechanics the first time you meet them. Good luck – may the ZMK be in your favour!
free-play.title: It's all yours now! 🎴

goal.text: Both players start with 40 health points (HP). The first one to reduce the opponent's HP to 0 wins. Your HP is at the bottom, the opponent's at the top.
goal.title: The goal of the game

gold-intro.text: At the start of each turn you gain gold: turn 1 = 100, turn 2 = 200... up to 1000. Cards cost gold. IMPORTANT: unspent gold DISAPPEARS at the end of your turn – spend it!
gold-intro.title: The gold system ⚜

hand-intro.text: These are your cards – the opponent can't see them. Your hand holds up to 10 cards. Hover or hold a card to inspect it up close.
hand-intro.title: Your hand

play-first-unit.text: Tap a card in your hand that you can afford (cost ⚜ in the left corner) and it will be summoned into the creature zone. A creature cannot attack on the turn it is summoned (unless it has ▶ Sprint).
play-first-unit.title: Summon a creature!

turn2-attack.text: Your creature can attack now: tap YOUR creature, then choose a target – an enemy creature or the opponent. When attacking a creature both sides draw a ZMK card and deal damage simultaneously!
turn2-attack.title: Time to attack! ⚔

watch-ai.text: The opponent draws a card, gains gold and plays by the same rules. Follow their actions in the event log in the middle.
watch-ai.title: The opponent's turn

welcome.text: This is a practice battle against an opponent who plays by the rules. I'll explain everything step by step. You can't lose badly here – it's just training!
welcome.title: Welcome to Ravenof! 🐦‍⬛

zmk-intro.text: Every time damage is dealt, a ZMK card is drawn: +0, +1, −1, +2, −2, ×2 or ×0. Your 4 ATK hit can become 5... or 0! This is Ravenof's die of fate.
zmk-intro.title: ZMK – the damage modifier deck

zones.text: Below is your side: hand, creature zone (5 slots), artifacts (2), reactions (3). Above is the opponent's. In the middle is the shared field card zone.
zones.title: The battlefield

layout.logHint: Tap outside or swipe left — it closes

lobby.randomInfo: The system will match you with another waiting player or create a room and wait.
lobby.resume: 🔄 You have an unfinished match with “{{name}}”. You can return if your opponent is still connected (30s).
lobby.roomCodeShare: Room code (give it to your opponent):
lobby.title: ⚔️ FRIENDLY BATTLE
lobby.waitingShareCode: Waiting for an opponent… Share the code.

practice.easyText: Simple trades, rarely plans combos, sometimes weak turns.
practice.factionHint: Pick the opponent's faction — the bot will get an AI deck of that faction.
practice.hardText: Plans 2–3 turns ahead, counts lethal, aggressively punishes a weak board.
practice.noDecks: No decks found. Try another search.
practice.normalText: Counts trades, uses removal/AoE sensibly, plays around lethal.
practice.randomText: The bot will pick a random faction and an auto-built deck. The fastest way to start training.
practice.searchPlaceholder: Search for a deck or author…
practice.title: Practice

diffDesc.easy: Simple trades, rare combos, occasional weak moves.
diffDesc.hard: Plans 2–3 turns ahead, calculates lethal, punishes a weak board.
diffDesc.normal: Calculates trades, uses removal/AoE, plays around lethal.

pve.randomInfo: The bot will pick a random faction and an automatic deck. The fastest way to start.
pve.randomOppSub: The AI will pick a faction and deck
pve.title: Practice vs AI

pvp.codeInfo: Create a private room (you'll get a code) or enter a friend's code.
pvp.createInfo: Create a private room and share the code with a friend.

err.ownRoom: You can't join your own room.
err.roomTaken: Room not found or already taken.

pvp.inviteInfo: Pick a friend in the list on the right — they'll get a battle invite. Rank unchanged · Win: +100 gold.
pvp.noDecks: You have no playable decks for a friendly battle.
pvp.noFriends: You have no friends yet. Add some in the Friends section.
pvp.quickInfo: Rank unchanged · Win: +100 gold · expected wait < 30 s.
pvp.quickInfo2: A quick public match against a random player. Rating does not change.

status.inviteSent: Invite sent. Waiting for your friend to join…
status.waitingFriendShare: Waiting for your friend. Share the code.

pvp.subtitle: Fight with no rank at stake against a random player or a friend. Invite from your friends list or use a room code.
pvp.title: Friendly battle

artifact.text: A permanent card in the artifact zone (max 2). It has HP and can be attacked, but never attacks itself. It works until destroyed.
artifact.title: ⭐ Artifact

battlecry.text: The effect triggers immediately when the card is summoned onto the board. If it deals damage, a ZMK card is drawn.
battlecry.title: 📣 Battlecry

champion.text: A Champion is NOT a creature: it has no ATK and never attacks, but it has powerful skills (once per turn). Summoning costs gold AND a sacrifice. It has 3 phases.
champion.title: ⚜ Champion

coin.text: A risk effect: GREEN side – success, RED – failure or a side effect. The card text tells you the exact outcome.
coin.title: 🪙 Coin flip

curse.text: A curse is shuffled into YOUR deck by card effects. Draw it and the effect triggers immediately, then the card goes to the graveyard.
curse.title: 🕸 Curse

evolve.text: The Champion evolves right on the battlefield (you need the phase card in hand + a sacrifice) and is fully healed. Skills grow stronger with each phase!
evolve.title: ⚜ Evolution

field.text: A global card that affects BOTH players. Only one can be active at a time – a new one replaces the old.
field.title: 🌍 Field card

hand-burn.text: Your hand holds only 10 cards – the excess burns and goes straight to the graveyard. Don't hoard cards!
hand-burn.title: Hand limit!

lastwish.text: The effect triggers as the creature dies, before it goes to the graveyard. A silenced creature does not trigger its Last Wish.
lastwish.title: 🕯 Last Wish

reaction.text: A face-down card with a gold token. The opponent sees the cost but not the effect. It triggers when its condition is met – e.g. before an attack. "Last placed – first resolved."
reaction.title: ⚡ Reaction

shield.text: The shield negates the NEXT damage this target would take – no ZMK is even drawn. Then the shield disappears.
shield.title: ✦★ Magic Shield

sprint.text: A creature with Sprint can attack on the turn it is summoned – no waiting!
sprint.title: ▶ Sprint

status-burning.text: At the start of each of its turns the creature takes 1 base damage (+ZMK). It burns until it dies or the status is removed by an effect.
status-burning.title: 🔥 Burning

status-frozen.text: The creature loses its next action: it cannot attack AND deals no counter damage when attacked. The status ends at the end of its controller's next turn.
status-frozen.title: ❄ Frozen

status-poisoned.text: Like Burning (1 damage per turn + ZMK), but it also attacks at DISADVANTAGE: it draws 2 ZMK cards and takes the worse one.
status-poisoned.title: ☠ Poisoned

status-silenced.text: The card's abilities stop working: passive effects, Battlecry, Last Wish – everything is blocked.
status-silenced.title: 🔇 Silenced

status-stunned.text: The creature cannot attack, but it still deals counter damage. That is the difference from Frozen.
status-stunned.title: ✦ Stunned

stealth.text: This creature cannot be targeted until it attacks. Stealth disappears after its first attack. AoE effects still hit it.
stealth.title: ◑ Stealth

taunt.text: While a creature with Taunt is on the board, all attacks MUST target it. Spells and effects ignore this – you can aim them anywhere.
taunt.title: ⊙ Taunt

unfavorable.text: 2 ZMK cards are drawn and the WORSE result for the acting player is used. This is how poisoned creatures attack.
unfavorable.title: Disadvantage

zmk-special.text: A special ZMK card was drawn! ×2 doubles the damage, ×0 negates it. Afterwards the whole ZMK deck and its discard pile are reshuffled.
zmk-special.title: ZMK ×2 / ×0!

tutorial.buttonHint: Tutorial battle vs AI: the board, gold, ZMK, tokens and step-by-step tips
